UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$text = ($input | Out-String).Trim(); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($text)) { Add-Content -Path 'C:\Downloads NVMe\ASP_Projekt_Sljeme\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Value 'PROMPT_TRIGGERED | input empty' } else { Add-Content -Path 'C:\Downloads NVMe\ASP_Projekt_Sljeme\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Value ('PROMPT: ' + $text) }"

preToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$text = ($input | Out-String).Trim(); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($text)) { Add-Content -Path 'C:\Downloads NVMe\ASP_Projekt_Sljeme\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Value 'TOOL_USED | input empty' } else { Add-Content -Path 'C:\Downloads NVMe\ASP_Projekt_Sljeme\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Value ('TOOL: ' + $text) }"
